100101110110101111111010011011001001110101011010010100011001111011110000000101011100 - ASI: 33

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  010 = 0 * 10
  011 = 0 * 11
  0101 = 010 * 1
  0110 = 011 * 0
  1100 = 11 * 00
  1111 = 11 * 11
  10101 = 1 * 0101
  11011 = 11 * 011
  010011 = 010 * 011
  100101 = 10 * 0101
  111111 = 11 * 1111
  0001100 = 000 * 1100
  0010101 = 00 * 10101
  1100000 = 1100 * 000
  0100110110 = 010011 * 0110
  0101111111 = 0101 * 111111
  0110100101 = 0110 * 100101
  0111100000 = 011 * 1100000
  00011001111 = 0001100 * 1111
  00101011100 = 0010101 * 1100
  01001110101 = 010011 * 10101
  10010111011 = 100101 * 11011
  010011011001001110101 = 0100110110 * 01001110101
  011010010100011001111 = 0110100101 * 00011001111
  011110000000101011100 = 0111100000 * 00101011100
  100101110110101111111 = 10010111011 * 0101111111
  011010010100011001111011110000000101011100 = 011010010100011001111 * 011110000000101011100
  100101110110101111111010011011001001110101 = 100101110110101111111 * 010011011001001110101
  100101110110101111111010011011001001110101011010010100011001111011110000000101011100 = 100101110110101111111010011011001001110101 * 011010010100011001111011110000000101011100
